page: Microsoft Azure FX64mds_v2 is a memory-intensive virtual machine belonging to the FXmdsv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. The server is equipped with 1344.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 21.0 GB per vCPU.

For local storage requirements, the instance includes 3780 GB of local disk capacity and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. This server does not include any graphics processing units, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphical or deep learning workloads. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the FX64mds_v2 represents a high-resource density profile designed for enterprise workloads where massive memory capacity and dedicated CPU resources are required. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes it a qualitative match for memory-bound applications rather than general-purpose compute. This server is designed for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, heavy enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-intensive transactional workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure FX64mds_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the FXmdsv2 family, powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated x86_64 Intel vCPUs and a substantial 1344.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 21.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for high-throughput disk operations, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware. Designed for resource-intensive enterprise applications, this server offers high memory density to support massive datasets without relying on external caching layers. The FX64mds_v2 is engineered for memory-bound workloads, making it highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy transactional database operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX64mds_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1344 GB of RAM, and 3780 GB of local storage for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure FX64mds_v2 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 Intel vCPUs, 1344 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage for enterprise databases.
tagline: A memory-intensive virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores, massive memory capacity, and high-speed local storage for enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 1344.0 GB of system memory with 21.0 GB per core
3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and ERP systems
